passages.passage_text: Data available from the National Institute of Nutrition (NIN) compares, separately for boys and girls, the average height recorded during 1979 with the 10 States covered by the period 1974-79 at different ages in the average for the NNMB survey. The 1979 height turns out to be neither uniformly higher nor uniformly lower than the 1974-79 average highest at ages 2, 5 and 9 in most of the States. However, the comparison at age 13 is more meaningful as it represents the cumulative result of childhood growth. At the age of 13 yr, the average height recorded for boys in 1979 is lower than the average for 1974-79 in only one State, Karnataka. For girls at this age, the average hight recorded in 1979 turns out to be lower than the 1974-79 average in four States Andhra Pradesh, Gujarat, Madhya Pradesh and Uttar Pradesh. In all other States, the 1979 average was greater than or equal to the 1974-79 average.

Doordarshan has undoubtedly helped popularise yoga among the people especially city dwellers but performing various 'asanas' without adequate instructions could be hazardous, according to a renowned 'yoga expert' who has conducted hundreds of yoga shivirs (camps). He says serval people, who tried to learn yoga through the programme of Doordarshan, have come to him complaining of pain in different parts of their body. He explains that the asanas involve a complicated but scientific technique of breathing which controls the flow of oxygen in various parts of the body under calculated stress.

The most empirical argument in favour of prayer is that it relieves the mind of tension, which is the natural concomitant of a life of hurry and worry.It neutralises mental repressions and purifies the subconsciousness. It releases an extra amount of hope and energy and thus enables a person to face life squarely. Life is not all sweetness, enjoyment and success, it is drudgery, pain and failure too.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: There are only two institutes NIN and NNMB which have collected data on average height.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: The data from Karnataka was collected by both NIN and NNMB.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: In Karnataka, the average age recorded in 1979 for both boys and girls was lower than that for 1974-79.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: More States indicated higher average in 1979 as compared to that of 1974-79.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Both the institutes NIN and NNMB collected data from 10 States only.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Separate statistics for boys and girls help understand the data in a better way.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: There may be large differences in the height of boys and girls from 2nd and 5th year.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: TV programmes on yoga have successfully replaced personal guidance by 'yoga experts'.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Yoga exercises (asanas) are quite safe for any person.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Many TV viewers of yoga programmes are unable to master the scientific technique of breathing while performing 'asanas'.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Uncontrolled flow of oxygen in parts of the body causes pain in those parts.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Quite a large number of 'yoga experts' are available.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Prayer is an important part of all religions.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: People are interested in finding out effects of prayer.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Subconsciousness plays no role in our life.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: There are some arguments for the benefits of prayer, which can be tested.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Prayer, by direct miracles, removes hurdles and difficulties from our life.
